question.text: A part-time research analyst is also subject to trading restrictions under Regulation 16. True or False?

answer.text: True — they face the same restrictions as full-time research analysts
False — part-time analysts have no trading restrictions
True — but only for derivatives trading
False — only full-time analysts have restrictions

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 16(2) explicitly includes part-time research analysts alongside independent analysts and those employed by research entities in trading restrictions. **The Trap:** Part-time status does not exempt from trading restrictions. The regulation specifically names part-time RAs. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 14 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Part-time research analysts must maintain the same compliance standards as full-time analysts including trading restrictions and disclosure requirements.
